  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

DDCM X91Serie_V1.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 705
Recv ID: 725
Baudrate: 125000
Func Addr: A5
Func Name: DDCM

    "minbytes": 3,
    "shiftbytescount": 4,
    "replybytes": "59020000000000",
    "sentbytes": "1902FF",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },

        "firstbyte": 6,

      },

        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },

        "ref": true,

      },
      "Config WRSEN": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Config Mirror memory": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Config LED Child lock feedback": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Config car direction": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Config Folding": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "721000",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3210",
    "name": "Stop Routine By Local Identifier",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 22,
    "sentbytes": "2184",
    "name": "Read Traceability information",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Spare parts Number in ASCII": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

  },

    "name": "TesterPresent.WithResponse",
    "deny_sds": []

    "replybytes": "50C0",

    "deny_sds": []
  },

        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Config global Closed": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "Config IMA recovery": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }
  },

        "endian": "Little"

      "Config Stop&Start function": {

  },

    "replybytes": "59060000000080000000",
    "sentbytes": "190600000080",

      },

        "firstbyte": 6

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.confirmedDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
  },

    "deny_sds": [],

        "ref": true

        "ref": true

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true

    }
  },
